title: Satay-Style Skewered Turkey
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring skewered turkey mince, inspired by Thai cuisine.

ingredients.name: Charred Peanuts
ingredients.notes: Chop charred peanuts for added crunch

ingredients.name: Satay Sauce
ingredients.notes: Optional, as you can use the curry paste and coconut milk to create a similar taste

ingredients.name: Crunchy Vegetables (bell peppers, onions, etc.)
ingredients.notes: Thread onto skewers for added texture

instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. Thread the turkey mince, crunchy vegetables, and charred peanuts onto skewers.
3. In a small bowl, mix the Thai red curry paste, coconut milk, and satay sauce (if using).
4. Brush the skewers with the curry paste mixture and season with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
